a:r.a:t: TOM Layer Details: [AR Intelligence]
The process shifts AR from reactive aging analysis to proactive, risk-based collections.
Data Unification: Integrating AR data into a single analytical layer.
Predictive Analysis: Applying ML models to predict payment likelihood and score risk.
Prioritized Action: Generating dynamic worklists that direct collection teams to the highest-risk accounts.

A centralized, self-service analytics model delivered through an interactive SAP Analytics Cloud dashboard. This provides business users with direct, on-demand access to trusted data and insights, significantly reducing the dependency on IT for standard reporting and ad-hoc queries.
Governance:
layer captures all of the risks and controls around the processes. It also addresses policies that help govern the processes and technologies.
Embedded via the SAP Datasphere semantic layer to guarantee consistent data, standardized KPIs, and SAP-governed data products for trusted, reusable analytics.
Operating model layers
What’s inside these deep ‘assets’
Technology:
layer describes which technology supports which part of the process, how it connects back to the process inputs, how the data integrations flow and how it relates to reporting
A unified cloud architecture on the
SAP Business Data Cloud
SAP Datasphere
: For data integration and creating a governed semantic layer.
SAP Databricks
: For developing and hosting the ML models (payment prediction & risk scoring).
SAP Analytics Cloud
: Serves as the interactive front-end for dashboards, reporting, and self-service analytics.
People:
layer describes who performs the work or executes those processes.
CFOs/Controllers: Gain real-time visibility for strategic decisions on working capital.
Collections Managers: Use ML-driven worklists to guide team efforts and improve efficiency
Service delivery model:
layer addresses how/where work is delivered and by whom. It also addresses the incremental things the client needs to run and operate a capability center.
Functional processes:
layer describes the activities within the enterprise and is the key to everything else. Remember, everything a client does can be described as a process
Performance insights and data:
layer captures the reporting that a process is using or is an output of that process. It also addresses master data management.
A
single source of truth
for all AR data, delivering:
Real-time KPIs
: DSO trends, On-Time Payment Rate, total overdue amount.
Predictive Insights
: ML-driven scores for on-time payment likelihood on open invoices.
Operational Data
: Prioritized collections worklists with drill-down capabilities to the invoice and customer level.
